description:
Daily 8 AM PHT cron. Lists every active applicant in Stage 10 (Passed
Assessment) and emails the HR Recruitment Manager group a phone-interview
queue with each candidate's name, phone (tel: link), email, position,
assessment scores, date reached Stage 10, days waiting, assigned recruiter.

Days-waiting > 2 → row colored red. > 1 → orange.

Refactored from the original action_phone_interview_report.py: replaced
the two list comprehensions with explicit for-loops to stay clear of
safe_eval closure risks.
